parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Pushjet destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise pjet:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native Pushjet message payload directly to your Pushjet server, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Pushjet destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your own Pushjet server (no Apprise)

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Pushjet host

secret_key_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Pushjet secret key
